subject: refactor(icons): adopt APP_ICONS filename convention
body:
Rename the vite-plugin-pwa scaffolding names (pwa-192x192.png,
pwa-512x512.png, pwa-1024x1024.png) to the glow-props APP_ICONS
pattern (icon-192.png, icon-512.png, icon-1024.png) so the
filenames match the fleet convention already used by glow-props.

Drop pwa-maskable-512x512.png: the pattern prescribes one maskable
entry (the 1024) and the 512 maskable was redundant — Android launchers
can downscale when needed.

Manifest + generator + service worker precache list updated in lockstep.

Tags: icons, pwa, refactor, fleet-alignment
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-docs
Semver: patch
title: adopt APP_ICONS filename convention
